title: Beauty Behind The Madness
notes:
Released in a gatefold jacket.
Labels indicate records weight to be 150 grams each.

Not to be confused with the [url=https://www.discogs.com/release/28334494-The-Weeknd-Beauty-Behind-The-Madness]2023 reissue manufactured in Mexico[/url].
